# Telnyx

> Cloud communications platform: programmable voice, messaging, numbers, IoT, AI, and networking APIs.

Telnyx provides telecom infrastructure as a service. Build voice calling, SMS/MMS messaging, phone number management, IoT connectivity, and AI-powered communication applications.

## Documentation

- [Developer Docs](https://developers.telnyx.com): Guides, tutorials, quickstarts
- [API Reference](https://developers.telnyx.com/api): Full REST API documentation
- [Messaging API](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/messaging): Send/receive SMS and MMS
- [Voice API](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/voice): Call Control, TeXML, conferencing
- [Numbers API](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/numbers): Search, purchase, configure phone numbers
- [10DLC Registration](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/10dlc): A2P messaging compliance
- [Verify API](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/verify): Phone verification, OTP, 2FA
- [AI Assistants](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/ai): Voice AI agents, inference, embeddings
- [IoT / Wireless](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/iot): SIM cards, eSIMs, data plans
- [SIP Trunking](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/sip-trunking): SIP connections, outbound voice profiles
- [WebRTC](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/webrtc): Browser and mobile VoIP calling
- [Storage](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/storage): S3-compatible cloud storage
- [Fax](https://developers.telnyx.com/docs/fax): Programmable fax

## SDKs

- [Python SDK](https://pypi.org/project/telnyx/): `pip install telnyx`
- [Node.js SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/telnyx): `npm install telnyx`
- [Go SDK](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-go): `go get github.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-go`
- [Java SDK](https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/com.telnyx.sdk/telnyx-java): Maven/Gradle
- [Ruby SDK](https://rubygems.org/gems/telnyx): `gem install telnyx`

## Agent Skills

AI coding agent skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Windsurf, and 12+ more:

```bash
npx skills add team-telnyx/skills
```

Or for Claude Code: `/plugin marketplace add team-telnyx/skills`

## Authentication

All API requests use Bearer token authentication:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

Get your API key at https://portal.telnyx.com

## Base URL

```
https://api.telnyx.com/v2
```

## Webhooks

Telnyx signs all webhooks with Ed25519. Verify using `telnyx-signature-ed25519` and `telnyx-timestamp` headers. Use `client.webhooks.unwrap()` in any SDK.

## Support

- [Support Center](https://support.telnyx.com)
- [Status Page](https://status.telnyx.com)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/team-telnyx)
